buildCommand: if [ "$VERCEL_ENV" = "production" ]; then npx convex deploy --cmd-url-env-var-name VITE_CONVEX_URL --cmd 'npm run build'; else npx convex deploy --preview-create "pr-${VERCEL_GIT_PULL_REQUEST_ID:-$VERCEL_GIT_COMMIT_REF}" --cmd-url-env-var-name VITE_CONVEX_URL --cmd 'npm run build' || npm run build; fi
